name: Music Sword Beat
description: Step into the world of Music Sword Beat, the ultimate 3D rhythm action game! Play piano-style beats while dashing forward with a glowing music sword. Slice enemies, dodge obstacles, and race through neon worlds synced perfectly to epic music. Enjoy hip-hop vibes, Y2K tracks, pop hits, and classical beats all in one game. Inspired by rhythm mods, you play as a brave Boyfriend protecting his Girlfriend from indie enemies. Tap, slash, and run to the beat in this thrilling music race gameplay.
